# ManagedPackage

**Structure**

A representation of a managed package.

## Declaration

```swift
struct ManagedPackage
```

## Overview

[doc://com.apple.ManagedAppDistribution/documentation/ManagedAppDistribution/ManagedPackage] represents a managed package that the framework can install. Use an instance of this object to obtain information about the package.

## Instance Properties

- **name**: The app’s localized name.
- **subtitle**: The app’s localized subtitle.

## Conforms To

- Copyable
- Equatable
- Escapable
- Hashable
- Identifiable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
title: ManagedPackage
